Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Mark Harris, Esq. for Petitioner: Ricardo Arroyo, present as Guardian at litem for: Jesus (Jesse) Arroyo, Vincent Arroyo, Victor Arroyo and Esmeraldo Arroyo, the minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
As to minor Jesus Arroyo:
Attorney's Fees $3,050.00, Medical Expenses $2,800.00, Balance $9,150.00 to be placed in a tax free Aviva annuity policy until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
As to minor Vincent Arroyo:
Attorney's Fees $4,050.00, Medical Expenses $3,800.00, Balance $12,150.00 to be placed in a tax free Aviva annuity policy until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
As to minor Victor Arroyo:
Attorney's Fees $3,050.00, Medical Expenses $2,800.00, Balance $9,150.00 to be placed in a tax free Aviva annuity policy until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
As to minor Esmeralda Arroyo:
Attorney's Fees $14,300.00, Medical Expenses $2,800.00, Balance $42,900.00 to be placed in a tax free Aviva annuity policy until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

No other appearances on this matter.
